title: lannea wodier var. brevifolia
intro: Lannea wodier var. brevifolia, also known as a variety of the Lannea wodier plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lannea wodier var. brevifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Lannea wodier var. brevifolia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tonics, or taken as supplements.
